ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "shirtnumber" INTEGER /* Shirt number of the player */,
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's nationality */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status of the player (e.g., under contract, on loan) */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_nationality_id FOREIGN KEY ("nationality_id") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_team" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_report_url" TEXT /* URL of the match report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_name FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_name") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_match_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_type_id") REFERENCES match_types ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., FW, LW, RB) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Group of the position (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender, Goalkeeper) */,
  "position_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality (e.g., FRA, BRA) */,
  "nationality_description" TEXT /* Description of the nationality */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "country_flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type (e.g., League, Cup, Friendly) */,
  "match_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  "match_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the match (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition (e.g., Champions League, La Liga) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "stadium_url" TEXT /* URL of the stadium's official website */,
  "stadium_year_built" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "stadium_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the stadium */,
  "stadium_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the stadium (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the historical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belonged to during the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player during the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player during the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player during the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player during the season */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the player belonged to during the season */,
  "goals_per_90" REAL /* Goals per 90 minutes played */,
  "assists_per_90" REAL /* Assists per 90 minutes played */,
  "shots_per_90" REAL /* Shots per 90 minutes played */,
  "shots_on_target_per_90" REAL /* Shots on target per 90 minutes played */,
  "touch_map_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's touch map */,
  "heat_map_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's heat map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to recover */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "medical_report_url" TEXT /* URL of the medical report */,
  "rehabilitation_plan_url" TEXT /* URL of the rehabilitation plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Full-time, Loan) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the next contract renewal */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  "contract_clause" TEXT /* Special clauses in the contract (e.g., buyout clauses) */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
